opportunities.specific_product: brushed gold or matte black cabinet pulls & knobs set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 kitchen facelift: swap the knobs, whole room looks new
opportunities.before_state: Dated brass or builder-grade white cabinet knobs making the kitchen feel old and un-updated
opportunities.after_state: Modern matte black or brushed gold pulls installed in under an hour, cabinets look custom
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's cabinet-refacing feature and BHG's kitchen paint-color/design-mistake posts are both pushing kitchen-refresh content this week, and hardware is the cheapest, fastest entry point into that trend.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $34 peel-and-stick tile turns a boring bath wall into a designer moment
opportunities.before_state: Plain builder-grade white tile or a dated, chipped tub surround
opportunities.after_state: Bold patterned tile look applied in an afternoon with no grout, tools, or contractor
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's bathtub-design roundup and BHG's 'bold bathroom tile is having a major moment' post both surfaced this week, signaling the aesthetic is about to hit mainstream search demand.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch couch cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $52 stretch cover hides a pet-hair-covered couch in one Reel
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch that looks tired in every room shot
opportunities.after_state: Tight-fit, wrinkle-free cover in a fresh neutral tone that looks brand new
opportunities.why_now: Living-room refresh and decluttering content (Real Simple's weekly-tidying push) is trending on Pinterest, and couch covers are the single most reliable transformation Reel format — Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes it worth prioritizing even without today's specific spike.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $36 curtain swap makes a bare window look like a hotel suite
opportunities.before_state: Bare window or thin, mismatched curtains letting in harsh light
opportunities.after_state: Rich velvet blackout drapes framing the window for an instant cozy upgrade
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's dorm/bedroom pins this week (sage green velvet curtains, gold lamp, gold vanity mirror) show a back-to-school decor wave building as students shop for dorm setups.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Cervical Pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: $60 pillow swap fixes the neck-pain sleep setup in one before/after
opportunities.before_state: Flat, lumpy pillow causing neck pain and poor sleep posture
opportunities.after_state: Contoured cervical pillow with proper neck support and tidy bed styling
buyer_intent_keywords: top sheet vs no top sheet
opportunities.why_now: Martha Stewart's bedding-basics post (top sheet debate) shows bedding content trending on Pinterest right now, and neck-pain pillow searches carry consistently high purchase intent — plus Eli & Elm's 20% commission makes it a priority brand.
